_meta.title: Development of "Purple Endosperm Rice" by Engineering Anthocyanin Biosynthesis in the Endosperm with a High-Efficiency Transgene Stacking System

useful_fields.field_value: OsDFR
useful_fields.comment: 不是主要研究基因

useful_fields.field_value: required for conversion
useful_fields.comment: 不太懂这是什么意思

useful_fields.field_value: RT-PCR amplification with degenerate primers and RACE from Coleus.
useful_fields.comment: 这个字段是否需要？我们的目的是输出结果，不是呈现实验过程。是否可以将该字段改为基因表达特征？其它基因同理。

useful_fields.field_value: downstream
useful_fields.comment: 需要具体说明是哪个代谢通路，在单篇文献研究中可以说是上游、下游，但是如果放到整个营养合成或次级代谢，这种描述就不够准确了。其它基因同理。

upstream

_meta.title: Multi-level engineering facilitates the production of phenylpropanoid compounds in tomato

useful_fields.field_value: ITAG2.3 context
useful_fields.comment: 参考基因组版本这个字段感觉意义不大。

useful_fields.field_value: NA
useful_fields.comment: 这个也不需要吧？是不是有基因号就说明了一切？而且这种信息，很多基因是不会在文献中提及的。

useful_fields.field_value: Transgenic fruit-specific overexpression in tomato, RNA-seq, ChIP-qPCR, ChIP-seq, qRT-PCR, isotope feeding/flux analysis, metabolite profiling, and combinatorial crosses with Del/Ros1, VvStSy, and LjIFS.
useful_fields.comment: 前面大量内容是与限定字段无关的描述，直接简单描述为：以AtMYB12过表达番茄分别与Del/Ros1, VvStSy, and LjIFS等番茄材料杂交，提高了XX化合物的含量。

useful_fields.field_value: Ripening tomato fruit, especially breaker to 10 days post-breaker; strongest induction observed several days after breaker under E8 promoter control.
useful_fields.comment: 可以直接描述为，在果实中特异表达对类黄酮化合物影响显著，CaMV 35S组成型表达对类黄酮化合物影响较小，而对初级代谢的可能反馈抑制植物生长发育。

useful_fields.field_value: Direct binding shown by ChIP-qPCR and ChIP-seq to promoters of DAHPS, ENO, CHS1, PAL5A/PAL5C/PAL5D, and F3H; bound regions contain TACCTACC motif.
useful_fields.comment:
其实可以直接描述为：与包含TACCTACC motif的基因启动子直接结合，比如DAHPS, ENO, CHS1, PAL5A/PAL5C/PAL5D, and F3H等。
因为我们用户要的只是一个结果，至于实验过程和方法什么的不是重点。

useful_fields.field_value: direct via direct regulation of key metabolic gene(s)
useful_fields.comment: 能否把具体直接调节的关键基因列举出来？

useful_fields.field_value: promotes flux toward product
useful_fields.comment: 具体是什么代谢流？加上具体的限定描述词。

useful_fields.field_value: Transgenic E8:AtMYB12 construct
useful_fields.comment: 不懂这个字段是表达什么意思

useful_fields.field_value: R2R3-MYB transcription factor
useful_fields.comment: 这应该是Regulator_Type的内容

useful_fields.field_value: Tomato mapping/annotation used ITAG2.3 for transcriptome and ChIP analyses
useful_fields.comment: 这个需要吗？感觉不需要做的这么细致到基因组版本，一是做育种不需要，二是读取文献信息容易出错（片面）。

useful_fields.field_value: transcription factor
useful_fields.comment: 这里应该是R2R3-MYB transcription factor

useful_fields.field_value: Tomato
useful_fields.comment: 这个基因来自拟南芥，只是在番茄中应用

useful_fields.field_value: Solanum lycopersicum
useful_fields.comment: Arabidopsis thaliana

useful_fields.field_value: MicroTom
useful_fields.comment: 同样，这里应该是拟南芥Arabidopsis thaliana，对于这种异源表达的基因，应该准确描述为基因来源_应用物种

_meta.title: Neofunctionalization of an OMT cluster dominates polymethoxyflavone biosynthesis associated with the domestication of citrus

useful_fields.field_value: Polymethoxyflavone (PMF) biosynthesis within the flavone branch of flavonoid metabolism
useful_fields.comment: 文章主要讲多甲氧基黄酮合成

useful_fields.field_value: S-adenosylmethionine (SAM) methyl donor; pH optimum 7.5; temperature optimum 45 °C
useful_fields.comment: 辅因子和辅酶字段中为啥会有最优反应pH和反应温度，SAM算甲基供体

useful_fields.field_value: BSA mapping, metabolome-transcriptome correlation, yeast feeding assays, recombinant protein enzyme assay, citrus callus overexpression, transient fruit flavedo overexpression, RNAi suppression
useful_fields.comment: 酶动力学检测，不同柑橘品种中总多甲氧基黄酮检测，OMTs与多甲氧基黄酮含量相关的转录组和代谢组联合分析，稳定表达

useful_fields.field_value: Fruit flavedo, leaves, callus suspension culture, and fruit developmental stages; especially assessed around 60 DPA and in mandarin domestication contrast
useful_fields.comment: 不同柑橘品种总多甲氧基黄酮差异比较

useful_fields.field_value: Recombinant CreOMT3 methylated hydroxyflavone substrates in yeast and purified enzyme assays; kinetic parameters determined for DMF1, 3'DNOB, GEN, CIR, LYS
useful_fields.comment: 附件中该酶可以催化多种底物生成多种产物，产物提取的不完全

useful_fields.field_value: Transient Agrobacterium overexpression/RNAi assays; in vitro enzyme assay conditions; no major abiotic treatment central to interpretation
useful_fields.comment: 提取内容与环境好像没太大关系

useful_fields.field_value: HPLC for PMF profiling; chromatographic comparison to standards; integrated metabolomics
useful_fields.comment: LC-MS

useful_fields.field_value: BSA pool sequencing: BioProject PRJNA938971; RNA-seq: PRJNA341533, PRJNA579049, PRJNA776912
useful_fields.comment: 代谢组和转录组联合分析

useful_fields.field_value: Red tangerine; Guoqing No.1 satsuma mandarin; Ota Ponkan mandarin; Clementine used for cloning/comparison
useful_fields.comment:
16个主要品种
候选基因的CDNA和启动子区域以不同柑橘品种为模版

useful_fields.field_value: Polymethoxyflavone (PMF) biosynthesis within the flavone branch of flavonoid metabolism
useful_fields.comment: 文章主要讲多甲氧基黄酮生物合成

useful_fields.field_value: SAM-dependent multisite O-methylation of hydroxyflavones, preferentially at C7 and C5, and also capable of C3, C6 and C3' methylation depending on substrate; converts intermediates such as 5DNOB toward nobiletin
useful_fields.comment: 是否可以提取该酶具体催化哪些底物生成那些产物，因为该酶催化的底物类型以及底物较多

useful_fields.field_value: S-adenosylmethionine (SAM) methyl donor; pH optimum 7.5; temperature optimum 45 °C
useful_fields.comment: 辅因子和辅酶字段中为啥会有最优反应pH和反应温度，SAM算甲基供体

useful_fields.field_value: BSA mapping, transcript-metabolite correlation, yeast and purified recombinant enzyme assays, citrus callus overexpression, transient fruit overexpression, RNAi suppression, site-directed mutagenesis, dual-luciferase promoter assay, association/genotyping across mandarins
useful_fields.comment: 酶动力学检测，不同柑橘品种中总多甲氧基黄酮检测，OMTs与多甲氧基黄酮含量相关的转录组和代谢组联合分析

useful_fields.field_value: HPLC profiling of PMFs; recombinant enzyme assays with chromatographic product identification; dual-LUC for promoter activity
useful_fields.comment:
LC-MS HPLC 
利用双荧光素酶实验检测启动子活性不属于代谢方法

useful_fields.field_value: S-adenosylmethionine (SAM) methyl donor; pH optimum 7.5; temperature optimum 45 °C
useful_fields.comment: 辅因子和辅酶字段中为啥会有最优反应pH和反应温度，SAM算甲基供体

useful_fields.field_value: BSA mapping, metabolome-transcriptome correlation, yeast feeding assays, purified recombinant enzyme assay, callus overexpression, transient fruit overexpression, RNAi suppression
useful_fields.comment: 酶动力学检测，不同柑橘品种中总多甲氧基黄酮检测，OMTs与多甲氧基黄酮含量相关的转录组和代谢组联合分析

useful_fields.field_value: Fruit flavedo, leaves, callus, and developing mandarin fruit; domestication-associated PMF variation
useful_fields.comment: 多种柑橘品种中总多甲氧基黄酮差异比较

useful_fields.field_value: BSA mapping, metabolome-transcriptome correlation, yeast feeding assays, purified recombinant enzyme assay, callus overexpression, transient fruit overexpression, RNAi suppression

useful_fields.field_value: Fruit flavedo, leaves, callus, and developing mandarin fruit; domestication-associated PMF variation
useful_fields.comment: 多种柑橘品种中总多甲氧基黄酮差异比较
